mapper.select: SELECT * FROM department_custom_field WHERE department = #{department} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM department_custom_field WHERE department = #{department} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM department_custom_field WHERE department = #{department} AND enabled = 1 AND ner_enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
